title: Choka Skell
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Choka}} {{Citation}} {{Character |type=Yuuzhan Vong |image=[[File:Chokaskellcade.jpg]] |name=Choka Skell |homeworld=[[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] |birth= |death= |species=[[Yuuzhan Vong]][[Legacy (2006) 11|''Legacy'' (2006) 11]] |gender= |pronouns=He/him''[[Legacy Era Campaign Guide]]'' |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes=White {{C|right}} and blue {{C|left}}[[Legacy (2006) 12|''Legacy'' (2006) 12]] |skin=Yellowish-white with gray [[Tattoo/Legends|tattoos]] |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation= |caste=[[Warrior caste]]{{CSWECite|III|157–158|Skell, Choka}} |domain=[[Domain Skell]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|These are Jeedai! We do not fight Jeedai!''"
"''It is so. But ''this'' is no Jeedai.|Nei Rin and Choka Skell, regarding Cade Skywalker|}} '''Choka Skell''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Warrior caste|warrior]] assigned to [[Master Shaper]] [[Nei Rin]] at the [[Jedi Academy (Ossus)|Jedi Temple]] on [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]]. Skell and [[Liaan Lah]] accompanied Nei Rin on a fact-finding mission on the sabotage of the [[Ossus Project]], only to return and find that all the Yuuzhan Vong at the [[temple]] had been [[Death/Legends|killed]]. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *[[Legacy (2006) 11|''Legacy'' (2006) 11]] {{1st}} *[[Legacy (2006) 12|''Legacy'' (2006) 12]] *[[Legacy (2006) 17|''Legacy'' (2006) 17]] ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[Legacy Era Campaign Guide]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Choka Skell |es=Choka Skell |pl=Choka Skell }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Skell, Choka}} [[Category:Domain Skell]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Ossus residents]] [[Category:Sekotans]] [[Category:Yuuzhan Vong warriors]]
